parentQuestion: A person has gone for a deep-tissue therapeutic massage. Which of the following ...

scaffolds.q: Deep-tissue massage can be uncomfortable or even slightly painful.
scaffolds.explain: Deep-tissue massage applies significant pressure to reach deeper muscle layers, which activates pain receptors along with pressure receptors. The discomfort is the point — you're activating nociceptors to break up adhesions and release tension. Sustain this attention:: pain as therapy.

scaffolds.q: Free nerve endings are the simplest type of sensory receptor.
scaffolds.explain: Free nerve endings are bare nerve terminals without specialized capsules. They detect pain, temperature, and light touch, and are found throughout the body. Simple structure, profound function.
